ogTitle: Wombats Rest vs Wongyarra: Climate Safety

heading: Wombats Rest vs Wongyarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wombats Rest, South Australia and Wongyarra, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wombats Rest has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Wongyarra (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wombats Rest or Wongyarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wombats Rest has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Wongyarra scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wombats Rest scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Wongyarra scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wombats Rest or Wongyarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wombats Rest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
